title: Ukrainian Potato Dumplings
description: A hearty Ukrainian dish featuring pan-fried dumplings filled with mashed potatoes and crispy onions.
instructions: Combine flour, egg, and water in a bowl to make the dumpling dough. Knead for 5 minutes.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of mashed potatoes in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the potatoes, forming a half-moon shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a large frying pan with butter over medium heat.
Add the dumplings to the pan, flat side down.
Cook for 3-4 minutes, until golden brown.
Flip the dumplings over and cook for another 3-4 minutes.
Serve hot with crispy onions on top.
